_about.title: G9 — container / layout family (A2UI's layout primitives land as ui-* controls)
_about.serves: .claude/docs/goals.md §G9. Ships A2UI's reserved Row/Column/Card/Tabs/Modal (a2ui-catalog SPEC §5.2, experimental→shipped) bound directly (SPEC-R8) to new ui-* containers with the ChildList child model, plus two non-catalog layout primitives (ui-list/ui-grid). The first NON-form family: containers extend UIElement via a shared UIContainerElement surface base — NOT form-associated (no ElementInternals value/validity; Tabs/Modal still use internals for ARIA + custom states). Pulls renderer LLD-C8 (two-way input binding) into scope. Governed by ADRs 0015 (surface/space tokens), 0016 (flex layout + container queries), 0017 (native-dialog modal), 0018 (one-level nested radius), 0019 (pull LLD-C8).
_about.method: system-decompose, components domain (COMPOSE = OUTSIDE-IN structure: slice groups → file-disjoint leaf slices; REALIZE = INSIDE-OUT actions: the ratified-ADR capabilities/acceptance, independent of the structure so they can contradict it). `hosts` crosses them; coverage_check.py --strict is the gate. The order/wave/build/files/dep/acceptance/gate keys overlay the all-at-once file-disjoint fan-out onto the coverage-clean structure (the gate ignores non-node/action/host keys). One writer per element FOLDER (its {ts,css,md} + ALL its probe files) — the fan-out grain the ratified session set; probes are folded into the element slice, not split out.
_about.ground_state: G5 ui-button + G6 ui-text-field/UIFormElement DONE; the A1 a2ui renderer spine + catalog (parser/dispatch/surface/binding/validate/widget/tree + the Button factory) shipped, with LLD-C8 (input.ts) DEFERRED (ADR-0001/0002 — control-dependent renderer tail gated on the components foundation; now unblocked). @agent-ui/shared ships dimensions.css (the --ui-height/font/gap ramp + [scale]/[density] on the `*` subtree ramp, ADR-0007) + tokens.css (8 colour families × roles, INCLUDING the two reused neutral surface ladders: -lowest…-highest scheme-inverting [elevation], -dimmest…-brightest scheme-consistent [brightness]). UIElement (dom/element.ts): connected()/disconnected() no-super hooks, this.effect/listen/emit, the protected `internals` acquired ONCE, render() void-when-empty (host-as-grid), the lazy-upgrade dance. props.ts: finalize()/ReactiveProps + the reflection locks; a subclass's static props SHADOWS the base's (no prototype merge) — so the surface base exposes SPREADABLE surfaceProps/flexProps, not inheritance (the ADR-0013 formProps precedent). traits/: pressActivation/tabbable/trackUserInvalid. descriptor/: the frontmatter schema + contract↔props trip-wire (BASE_CLASSES must gain UIContainerElement). The component rubric + component-reviewer agent + the browser-truth harness (@vitest/browser + Playwright, npm run test:browser) EXIST (G5) — this milestone RUNS them. references/: anatomy.md (slot×role), geometry.md (the Container/layout size-class — no control height), interaction-states.md, tokens.md, component-packaging.md.
_about.decisions_ratified: Five design decisions, ratified by the planning session (2026-06-28) and recorded as ADRs (s0, gating the build): 0015 the elevation×brightness surface model (reuse the existing neutral surface ladders; signed [-3..3] reflected literal-union props; 0=neutral base; one role-pure --ui-container-bg seam; the both-set COMPOSITION = the proposed base-plane + tonal-overlay mechanism, exact ladder/shadow/AA routed to tokens-specialist) + the --ui-space density-responsive layout-spacing ladder + the shared --ui-radius-base. 0016 A2UI-faithful flex (Row/Column = display:flex with shared flexProps align/justify/gap/wrap; List=role=list column; Grid=auto-fit/minmax) + container-query intrinsic responsiveness (reflow on OWN width, NO breakpoint props). 0017 ui-modal on native <dialog> showModal() (top-layer/backdrop/trap/Escape free; focus RESTORE is ours; NOT a form widget → honours 'no native form elements', the ADR-0014 widgets-not-elements reading). 0018 CSS one-level nested radius via the published --ui-card-child-radius (the JS nestedRadius controller REJECTED). 0019 pull renderer LLD-C8 (the generic two-way input controller) into this milestone — serves Tabs `selected` / Modal `open` + back-fills the deferred text-field value bind.
_about.scope_note: List/Grid are NOT A2UI catalog types (the §5.2 reserved set is Row/Column/Image/Video/Card/Tabs/Modal) — they ship as ui-* primitives usable directly; only Row/Column/Card/Tabs/Modal flip to shipped, Image/Video stay absent (media, not this milestone). Flagged in the handoff, not re-opened. The card/tabs region+item sub-elements (ui-card-header/-content/-footer, ui-tab/ui-tab-panel) are component-native ChildList children with their own catalog sub-types (CardHeader/CardContent/CardFooter, Tab/TabPanel) — declared by the catalog writer (s11) per the ratified 'regions = sub-elements' decision.

_build_legend.now: buildable at the current ground state (G6 + A1 spine done)
_build_legend.prep: serial prerequisite that unblocks the wide fan-out
_build_legend.fan-out: file-disjoint with its wave siblings — one writer per folder, parallel-safe
_build_legend.integration: the LONE components-package shared-tree slice (barrels) — every cross-slice barrel edit deferred here, serial
_build_legend.judgment-gate: verified by the component-reviewer's score, not a script

_first_slice: s0 ADRs (0015–0019, planning-lead — gates the build) then the PREP pair s1 (tokens, tokens-specialist) ∥ s2 (UIContainerElement surface base + surfaceProps/flexProps + the shared container.css) — the serial prerequisites every container folder extends/consumes; build them before the wide fan-out.

_waves.A-prep: s0 (ADRs, planning-lead) → s1 (tokens, tokens-specialist; @agent-ui/shared) ∥ s2 (surface base; @agent-ui/components dom) — parallel: s2 references the s1 token NAMES (ADR-fixed), file-disjoint packages
_waves.B-fanout: s3 ui-row ∥ s4 ui-column ∥ s5 ui-list ∥ s6 ui-grid ∥ s7 ui-card(+regions) ∥ s8 ui-tabs(+tab/panel) ∥ s9 ui-modal ∥ s10 renderer input.ts (LLD-C8) ∥ s11 catalog wiring — all file-disjoint; controls extend s2 + consume s1; s10/s11 reference the LLD-fixed tag/value contract (parallel-safe)  [after s0,s1,s2; s10,s11 after s0]
_waves.C-integration: s12 (components barrels: controls/index.ts + component-styles.css + dom/index.ts + size/tree-shake) — the LONE serial integration slice  [after s2,s3,s4,s5,s6,s7,s8,s9]
_waves.D-score: s13 (review row/column/list/grid) ∥ s14 (review card family) ∥ s15 (review tabs) ∥ s16 (review modal) — the per-element component-reviewer promotion gates  [after s12]

_predicted_gates.standing: npm run check && npm test  →  green (every code/probe slice: s1,s2,s3,s4,s5,s6,s7,s8,s9,s10,s11 code + s12)
_predicted_gates.browser: npm run test:browser  →  Chromium AND WebKit green — the surface forced-colors survival (s2/elements), Row/Column container-query reflow (resize the WRAPPER not the viewport, s3/s4), Modal top-layer + focus trap/restore + Escape (s9), Tabs roving + panel switch (s8), Card nested-radius decrement (s7) — anti-vacuous (assert the px/state actually CHANGES)
_predicted_gates.drift: the contract↔props trip-wire — each {name}.md attributes[] ≡ finalize(Class), reflect/values agree (folded into each element's -probes); BASE_CLASSES gains UIContainerElement; a drifted attribute FAILS (negative control)
_predicted_gates.size: npm run size  →  each container marginal within budget; tree-shake clean (importing one container drags only it + UIContainerElement + real deps) (s12)
_predicted_gates.score: component-reviewer verdict COMPOSE≥4 AND REALIZE≥4, zero [gate] fails, per element (s13–s16 — judgment gates)

nodes.label: G9 container / layout family
serial PREP — ratification + tokens + the surface base
ADRs 0015–0019 — surface/space token model + flex/container-query layout + native-dialog modal + one-level nested radius + pull LLD-C8
nodes.acceptance: Five ADRs record the ratified decisions, each Repairs its owning doc by ID (goals §G9 NEW · a2ui-catalog SPEC §5.2/R4/R7 · a2ui-renderer LLD-C8 · references tokens.md/geometry.md · plan §2). 0015 fixes the two reflected literal-union axes (elevation→-lowest…-highest, brightness→-dimmest…-brightest, 0=neutral), the one role-pure --ui-container-bg/-tint seam, the proposed base-plane+tonal-overlay composition (exact ladder/shadow/AA routed to tokens-specialist), --ui-space (density-responsive) + --ui-radius-base. 0016 fixes the shared flexProps + container-query responsiveness (no breakpoint props). 0017 fixes native <dialog> showModal() + the widgets-not-elements scoping of 'no native form elements' (the platform traps; control restores focus). 0018 fixes the published --ui-card-child-radius one-level chain + records the rejected JS controller. 0019 fixes building input.ts (LLD-C8) here for Tabs/Modal/text-field. orchestration-lead accepts (proposed→accepted) before the build proceeds.

nodes.label: tokens (tokens-specialist) — @agent-ui/shared dimensions.css (--ui-space density-responsive ladder + --ui-radius-base) + tokens.css (the elevation×brightness composition realization + AA)
nodes.dep: s0 (ADR-0015 fixes the token NAMES + the composition contract); file-disjoint from s2 (different package)
nodes.acceptance: dimensions.css: a --ui-space-{step} layout-spacing ladder declared on the `*` subtree ramp (ADR-0007) so a subtree [density] re-multiplies it — calc(<base px> * var(--ui-density)); [scale] does NOT touch it (it is rhythm, not frame). --ui-radius-base on :root (a constant, not subtree-derived). tokens.css: realize ADR-0015 clause 3 composition — the brightness tonal layer (a deliberately-designed per-scheme alpha wash role, or a reused scrim role, since the existing -dimmest…-brightest ladder is SOLID not translucent) + (optional) the elevation --ui-container-shadow ramp; reuse the existing -lowest…-highest / -dimmest…-brightest ladders for the solo mappings (NO new surface roles for those). VERIFY --c-neutral-on-surface stays WCAG-AA across the combined 7×7 extremes (elevation=3,brightness=-3 AND elevation=-3,brightness=3) in BOTH schemes — the AA surface (report the worst-case ratio). Forced-colors: the surface drops to system colours via the role layer (free). NO new surface tokens beyond the one composition wash role + (optional) shadow. NEGATIVE control: a contrast probe asserts a combined-extreme cell that drops below AA FAILS.
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test (the token/contrast probes)

nodes.label: dom/container.ts — UIContainerElement (the surface base) + spreadable surfaceProps/flexProps + the shared controls/_surface/container.css (the --ui-container-bg seam + [elevation]/[brightness] mapping + container-type)
nodes.dep: s0 (ADR-0015/0016 fix the props + seam); references s1 token NAMES (ADR-fixed, parallel-safe)
nodes.acceptance: UIContainerElement extends UIElement (reuses the protected `internals`; NOT form-associated — no formAssociated, no setFormValue/validity). A spreadable `static surfaceProps = { elevation: enum(-3|-2|-1|0|1|2|3, reflect, default 0), brightness: enum(same) }` and a spreadable `static flexProps = { align: enum(start|center|end|stretch|baseline, reflect), justify: enum(start|center|end|between|around|evenly, reflect), gap: enum(<--ui-space steps>, reflect), wrap: boolean(reflect) }` — both spread by subclasses into their own `static props` (no prototype merge — the ADR-0013 formProps pattern). The base owns NO layout/surface CSS opinion in TS (CSS does the role repoint). container.css: a :where() block + a shared mapping — `--ui-container-bg`/`--ui-container-tint` consumption seam; [elevation=n] repoints --ui-container-bg to --c-neutral-surface-{lowest…highest}; [brightness=m] repoints --ui-container-tint (the base-plane background-color + tonal-overlay background-image, ADR-0015 cl.3); 0 in either axis = the neutral base (unset = unchanged); `container-type: inline-size` establishes the query container (the responsiveness seam, ADR-0016 cl.4); forced-colors keeps the surface via the role layer. The base reads ONLY --ui-container-* (role-pure, no raw --c-* in the consumption). Imports only ../reactive + ./element.ts/./props.ts (layering holds). container.test.ts (jsdom): elevation/brightness reflect; a @ts-expect-error proves a bare number is rejected; surfaceProps/flexProps spread into a throwaway subclass's finalize table; connect→disconnect zero residue. NEGATIVE control: a bare-number elevation fails @ts-expect-error.

nodes.label: layout primitives — row / column / list / grid (ADR-0016)
controls/row/ — ui-row (display:flex row) + flexProps + container-query reflow + probes
nodes.acceptance: ui-row extends UIContainerElement; static props = { ...UIContainerElement.surfaceProps, ...UIContainerElement.flexProps }; self-defines ui-row. row.css (ADR-0003, two sectioned blocks): :where(ui-row) declares --ui-row-* from --ui-container-bg + the flex mapping; @scope (ui-row) — display:flex; flex-direction:row; the align/justify/gap/wrap literal-union → align-items/justify-content/gap(var(--ui-space-*))/flex-wrap repoints (role-pure, no inline style); a @container inline-size reflow rule (e.g. wrap to a column under a narrow container, ADR-0016 cl.4); forced-colors surface survives. NO control height (geometry.md Container/layout class — spacing off --ui-space × density, never --ui-height-*). row.md frontmatter mirrors static props + face:{formAssociated:false}; references anatomy/geometry/tokens by standard. Probes: jsdom (props reflect, flex mapping applied, role=none/no host aria); css-hygiene (@scope consumes only --ui-row-*, no raw --c-*, sectioned blocks, forced-colors block); descriptor trip-wire (attributes[] ≡ finalize); browser smoke (Chromium+WebKit: align/justify CHANGE the computed flex props; gap responds to [density]; the row REFLOWS by CONTAINER width — resize the wrapper, not the viewport — anti-vacuous). NEGATIVE controls: a bare-string `align` @ts-expect-error; a planted raw --c-* ref FAILS css-hygiene.
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:browser

nodes.label: controls/column/ — ui-column (display:flex column) + flexProps + container-query reflow + probes
nodes.acceptance: ui-column = ui-row's sibling with flex-direction:column (the tag names the main axis, A2UI-faithful — direction is identity, not a prop). Same flexProps + surface + container-query + probe contract as s3 (s3 is the canonical layout template; column copies it with the axis flipped). flexProps shared from s2 (no re-declaration of the grammar). Probes mirror s3's set (jsdom/css/descriptor/browser, container-query reflow anti-vacuous). NEGATIVE controls as s3.
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:browser

nodes.label: controls/list/ — ui-list (semantic vertical stack, role=list) + probes
nodes.acceptance: ui-list = a ui-column specialization carrying LIST SEMANTICS — connected() sets internals.role='list' (NOT a host attribute — internals-only ARIA, the family discipline); children are list items (the agent composes ui-* item children as ChildList). Consumes flexProps (vertical stack) + surfaceProps. list.css mirrors the column layout + the surface. list.md records role list (roleSource: internals/host) + face:{formAssociated:false}. NOT A2UI catalog-mapped (ships as a direct ui-* primitive — flagged). Probes: jsdom (role=list via internals; props reflect; the HOST carries no role attribute — role rides internals); css-hygiene; descriptor trip-wire; browser smoke (the AX tree reads role=list; gap responds to [density]). NEGATIVE control: the host has NO `role` attribute (role is on internals, not the host).
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:browser

nodes.label: controls/grid/ — ui-grid (auto-fit/minmax track grid) + probes
nodes.acceptance: ui-grid extends UIContainerElement; static props = { ...surfaceProps, gap (from flexProps), min: dimension (the minmax floor, default --ui-grid-min) }. grid.css: @scope (ui-grid) — display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(var(--ui-grid-min), 1fr)); gap var(--ui-space-*); the INTRINSIC reflow (no explicit column-count prop — auto-fit reflows by width, ADR-0016 cl.3/4); surface + forced-colors. NOT A2UI catalog-mapped (ships as a direct ui-* primitive — flagged). Probes: jsdom (props reflect, grid display); css-hygiene; descriptor trip-wire; browser smoke (the track count CHANGES with container width — auto-fit reflow, anti-vacuous — and gap responds to [density]). NEGATIVE control: assert the rendered column count actually changes across two container widths (not vacuous).
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:browser

nodes.label: ui-card + regions (surface / region grid / nested radius / scroll)
controls/card/ — ui-card + ui-card-header/-content/-footer: the surface container, presence-driven region grid, header/footer anatomy, content scroll, one-level nested radius + probes
nodes.acceptance: FOUR elements, all extend UIContainerElement, all self-define, all in one folder/one writer; card.css is the single sheet (sectioned :where()/@scope) covering the family; card.md documents the family (or one .md per element if the descriptor source needs it — keep the writer's choice consistent with component-descriptor-source). ui-card: surfaceProps (elevation/brightness); display:grid with PRESENCE-DRIVEN rows (:has(ui-card-header) etc., content row 1fr); padding off --ui-space; border --c-neutral-outline-variant; radius var(--ui-card-radius, var(--ui-radius-base)); PUBLISHES --ui-card-child-radius: max(0px, var(--ui-card-radius) − var(--ui-card-padding)); a nested ui-card reads it for its own --ui-card-radius (ONE level; ADR-0018; depth ≥2 manual; explicit border-radius reseeds). ui-card-header/-footer: reuse the leading/label/trailing anatomy (anatomy.md host-as-grid :has() columns) — leading/trailing data-role adornments, label the accessible content; a fill takes the card INNER radius (r_card − padding). ui-card-content: the body (default children, no anatomy); `scroll` (boolean presence → overflow:auto; min-block-size:0 — requires a constrained card block-size, documented) + `scroll-fade` (mask-image edge fade, scroll-driven-animation primary with a static fallback). ARIA minimal/opt-in via internals (role group/region only with an accessible name; no host attributes). Probes: jsdom (region presence grid; the published child-radius value; scroll overflow; props reflect); geometry (static: child-radius == max(0, parent−padding); padding off --ui-space; header/footer slot edges per anatomy.md); css-hygiene; descriptor trip-wire; browser smoke (the nested card radius DECREMENTS one level — measured px; scroll contains within a sized card). NEGATIVE controls: same-radius nesting (no decrement) FAILS the geometry probe; a depth-2 card is documented (not asserted) concentric.
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:browser

nodes.label: tabs + modal (full a11y widget contract)
controls/tabs/ — ui-tabs + ui-tab + ui-tab-panel: roving tabindex, tablist/tab/tabpanel ARIA, bindable selected, panel show/hide + probes
nodes.acceptance: THREE elements (one folder/one writer). ui-tabs extends UIContainerElement; static props = { ...surfaceProps, selected: string|number (the active tab id/index, observed, BINDABLE — the renderer two-way-binds it via LLD-C8, ADR-0019; reflected) }. ARIA via internals: ui-tabs hosts the tablist (internals.role='tablist' on the tab strip part or a [data-part=tablist]); ui-tab → role=tab + aria-selected + aria-controls its panel; ui-tab-panel → role=tabpanel + aria-labelledby its tab. ROVING TABINDEX: exactly the selected tab has tabindex=0, the rest tabindex=-1; ArrowLeft/Right (and Home/End) move the roving focus + selection (a selection-commit pattern); a scope-owned effect re-applies on `selected` change (re-arms on reconnect). PANEL show/hide: only the selected panel is shown (hidden attr / [hidden] on the rest). COMMIT: click or keyboard on a tab sets `selected` + emits the family `select` event. The interactive tab rows take the CONTROL height (geometry.md Pattern class) while the shell uses --ui-space. Probes: jsdom (roving tabindex 0/-1; selected reflects; panel hidden toggles; ArrowRight moves selection; select event on commit; zero residue on disconnect, re-arm on reconnect; ARIA roles on internals not host attrs); css-hygiene; descriptor trip-wire (parts [tablist], the tab/panel roles, customStates, face:{formAssociated:false}, the bindable selected); browser smoke (Chromium+WebKit: ArrowRight roves focus + switches the visible panel; the AX tree reads tablist/tab/tabpanel; forced-colors keeps the selected-tab indicator). NEGATIVE control: a non-selected tab is NOT tabindex=0 (roving, not all-tabbable).
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:browser

nodes.label: controls/modal/ — ui-modal on native <dialog> showModal(): top-layer, focus trap (platform) + restore (control), Escape, dialog ARIA, bindable open + probes
nodes.acceptance: ui-modal extends UIContainerElement; static props = { ...surfaceProps, open: boolean(reflect, BINDABLE — two-way via LLD-C8, value:{prop:'open',event:'toggle'}, ADR-0019), persistent: boolean(reflect, default false — presence-boolean; <ui-modal persistent> = non-dismissable, ADR-0020) }. connected(): create-once (idempotent guard) a light-DOM <dialog data-part=dialog>; move/render children into it; render() stays the inherited VOID (no html``/no re-create — re-creating drops top-layer/focus state). A scope-owned effect: open→dialog.showModal() (top-layer + ::backdrop + focus trap + Escape FREE), !open→dialog.close(). On platform close/cancel (Escape, backdrop click when NOT persistent): set open=false (sync prop↔platform) + emit `close` + `toggle`. FOCUS RESTORE (the one platform gap, ADR-0017 cl.4): record document.activeElement at open, restore it on close; initial focus honours an autofocus child else the dialog. ARIA: aria-modal from showModal(); accessible name via aria-labelledby/label on the dialog part; the HOST carries NO role/aria attribute. NOT a form widget (honours 'no native form elements' — the ADR-0014 widgets-not-elements reading; <dialog> submits nothing, no value). modal.css: the dialog part surface (surfaceProps) + ::backdrop scrim (--c-neutral-scrim role) + forced-colors. Probes: jsdom (open toggles showModal/close — against a <dialog> stub where jsdom lacks showModal; close event + open=false on platform close; focus restore target recorded/restored; host has no role attr; zero residue); css-hygiene; descriptor trip-wire (parts [dialog], face:{formAssociated:false}, the bindable open); browser smoke (Chromium+WebKit: showModal renders in the TOP LAYER above a high-z-index sibling; focus is TRAPPED inside; Escape closes + restores focus to the opener; ::backdrop paints + survives forced-colors). NEGATIVE control: focus restore returns to the EXACT opener element (not document.body).
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:browser

nodes.label: A2UI integration — renderer LLD-C8 + the catalog wiring
a2ui/src/renderer/input.ts — LLD-C8 the generic two-way input binding controller (SPEC-R7) + probes
nodes.dep: s0 (ADR-0019); the A1 renderer surface/binding shipped; references the LLD-fixed WidgetFactory value:{prop,event} contract (parallel-safe with s11)
nodes.acceptance: implements renderer LLD-C8 (a2ui-renderer.lld §6, SPEC-R7): for a widget whose factory marks valueBinding + valuePath, install (via surface.ac — the surface AbortController) a listener on the control's declared commit event that writes the new value into surface.data at valuePath (optimistic, structural-sharing setPointer so per-path waking holds — binding LLD-C5). ONE generic controller, NO per-component code; the value flows into action context on commit (LLD-C9, already shipped). input.test.ts: a stub control emitting input/change writes its value into surface.data at the path; the bound path's computed re-resolves (only its dependents wake — N2); teardown via surface.ac leaves zero listeners (inspect/AbortSignal). NEGATIVE control: a widget with NO valueBinding installs no listener (the controller is opt-in by the factory mark). This ADR changes LLD-C8's SCHEDULE, not its design — cite SPEC-R7, do not re-derive.

nodes.label: catalog wiring — default/catalog.json + factories.ts (Row/Column/Card/Tabs/Modal → ui-* + value:{prop,event} + ChildList) + SPEC §5.2 flip + catalog LLD
nodes.dep: s0 (ADR-0016/0019); references the LLD-fixed ui-* tag NAMES (parallel-safe with the control folders — factories create by tag string; the render-integration test validates post-s12)
nodes.acceptance: catalog.json declares the container component types DIRECTLY (SPEC-R8, no adapter): Row→ui-row, Column→ui-column, Card→ui-card, Tabs→ui-tabs, Modal→ui-modal — each with its typed `properties` (mapsTo the ui-* prop) and child model `ChildList` (regions = sub-elements, SPEC-R3/R4). The region/item sub-types CardHeader/CardContent/CardFooter→ui-card-header/-content/-footer and Tab/TabPanel→ui-tab/ui-tab-panel are declared (component-native ChildList children, the ratified 'regions = sub-elements'). Two-way: Tabs declares value:{prop:'selected',event:'select'}, Modal declares value:{prop:'open',event:'toggle'} (consumed by s10's LLD-C8); the existing TextField value:{prop,event} becomes live (the back-fill, ADR-0019 cl.3). factories.ts adds a WidgetFactory per type (create by tag + applyProp per mapsTo, the buttonFactory template); defaultFactories gains the entries. SPEC §5.2 table: Row/Column/Card/Tabs/Modal flip experimental→shipped (Image/Video stay absent; List/Grid noted as non-catalog ui-* primitives — SPEC-N2 no silent dead types). catalog LLD §5 build-sequence note updated. Probes: factories.test (each create()s the right tag; applyProp maps each declared prop); index.test (catalog loads — every declared component resolves to a registered factory, SPEC-R3 AC1; conformance accepts a container payload, 0 CATALOG). The render-integration (a container payload renders real ui-* controls) is exercised by the standing gate after s12. NEGATIVE control: a Modal payload missing its required prop, or a type with no factory, FAILS conformance (CATALOG / CATALOG_FACTORY_MISSING).

nodes.label: packaging / integration (the lone serial slice)
components barrels — controls/index.ts (+7 folders) · component-styles.css (+ container.css then each {name}.css) · dom/index.ts (+UIContainerElement/surfaceProps/flexProps) + size/tree-shake
nodes.acceptance: the LONE components-package shared-tree slice — every cross-slice barrel edit deferred here, serial: controls/index.ts adds `export *` for each new element module (row/column/list/grid/card+regions/tabs+tab/panel/modal — the self-define side effects); component-styles.css adds `@import './controls/_surface/container.css'` FIRST (the shared surface mapping, before any element) then one `@import` per `{name}.css` (annotated do-not-reorder); dom/index.ts re-exports UIContainerElement + surfaceProps/flexProps + their types. If any fleet-wide test enumerates controls/ (component-descriptor-source.test.ts / file-set.test.ts / barrels.test.ts / tree-shake.test.ts / site-canon.test.ts), update it HERE. The descriptor BASE_CLASSES gains UIContainerElement (a one-line descriptor-schema edit — co-located here if it is a barrel-adjacent fleet file, else flagged for s2). npm run check && npm test green; npm run size shows each container marginal within budget and tree-shake clean (importing one container drags only it + UIContainerElement + real deps); the import-layering trip-wire stays green. The catalog wiring (s11) lives in the a2ui package — a separate single-writer slice, file-disjoint from this one.
nodes.gate: npm run check && npm test && npm run size

nodes.label: the per-element promotion gates (judgment)
rubric score — component-reviewer scores ui-row/-column/-list/-grid both axes ≥4
nodes.acceptance: the EXISTING component-reviewer scores each layout primitive against .claude/docs/rubrics/component.md + its contract: COMPOSE ≥4 (C1–C5) AND REALIZE ≥4 (C6–C10), zero [gate] fails — the flex mapping, the container-query responsiveness, the surface axes, role-purity, the descriptor trip-wire all hold. G9 for the layout primitives is declared done.

nodes.label: rubric score — component-reviewer scores ui-card + regions both axes ≥4
nodes.acceptance: the component-reviewer scores ui-card/-card-header/-content/-footer: COMPOSE ≥4 AND REALIZE ≥4, zero [gate] fails — the region grid, the header/footer anatomy reuse, the one-level nested radius (decrement proven), the scroll system, the surface. G9 for the card family is declared done.

nodes.label: rubric score — component-reviewer scores ui-tabs + tab/panel both axes ≥4
nodes.acceptance: the component-reviewer scores ui-tabs/-tab/-tab-panel: COMPOSE ≥4 AND REALIZE ≥4, zero [gate] fails — the full a11y widget contract (roving tabindex, tablist/tab/tabpanel ARIA, bindable selected, panel switch, keyboard nav). G9 for tabs is declared done.

nodes.label: rubric score — component-reviewer scores ui-modal both axes ≥4
nodes.acceptance: the component-reviewer scores ui-modal: COMPOSE ≥4 AND REALIZE ≥4, zero [gate] fails — native <dialog> top-layer, focus trap+restore, Escape, dialog ARIA, bindable open, the not-a-form-widget rationale. G9 for the modal is declared done.

actions.label: the five design decisions (surface/space tokens · flex+container-query layout · native-dialog modal · one-level nested radius · pull LLD-C8) are ratified as ADRs 0015–0019
the --ui-space layout-spacing ladder is density-responsive (on the `*` subtree ramp, re-multiplied by a subtree [density]; [scale] does not touch it)
--ui-radius-base is a shared :root radius constant seeding the card chain (and the text-field #71 follow-up)

the elevation×brightness composition is realized in the token layer (the brightness wash + optional shadow), with --c-neutral-on-surface verified WCAG-AA across the combined 7×7 extremes in both schemes
UIContainerElement extends UIElement as the shared surface base — NOT form-associated (no value/validity), reuses the protected internals
spreadable surfaceProps (elevation/brightness, signed reflected literal unions, 0=neutral) the containers fold into their own static props (no prototype merge)
spreadable flexProps (align/justify/gap/wrap, reflected literal unions → CSS flex props) — one layout grammar, four consumers

the one role-pure --ui-container-bg/-tint consumption seam + the [elevation]/[brightness]→bg mapping (base-plane + tonal-overlay composition); 0=neutral leaves an unset container unchanged; forced-colors-safe surface
container-query intrinsic responsiveness — the container-type:inline-size seam (no breakpoint props; primitives reflow on their OWN width)
ui-row = display:flex row consuming flexProps + surfaceProps; the @container reflow rule
ui-row jsdom/css/descriptor/browser probes — flex mapping applied, gap responds to [density], CONTAINER-width reflow (anti-vacuous) + negative controls
ui-column = display:flex column (the axis is the tag's identity, not a prop)
ui-column probes mirror row's (jsdom/css/descriptor/browser, container-query reflow) + negative controls
ui-list carries role=list via internals (a semantic vertical stack; the host carries no role attribute); ChildList item children
ui-list probes — role=list on internals (not host attr), gap responds to [density] + a negative control
ui-grid = display:grid auto-fit/minmax — intrinsic reflow by width, no explicit column-count prop
ui-grid probes — the track count CHANGES with container width (anti-vacuous auto-fit reflow) + a negative control
ui-card the surface/border/radius/padding container (surfaceProps; padding off --ui-space; root radius --ui-radius-base)
the presence-driven region grid (:has(ui-card-header) etc.; content row 1fr) — absent regions leave no phantom row
ui-card-header/-footer reuse the leading/label/trailing anatomy (anatomy.md host-as-grid); a fill takes the card inner radius
ui-card-content the body — scroll (overflow:auto; min-block-size:0, needs a sized card) + scroll-fade (mask edge fade, scroll-driven primary + static fallback)
one-level nested radius — a card publishes --ui-card-child-radius = max(0, radius − padding); a nested card reads it; depth ≥2 manual; the JS controller rejected
card family probes — region presence grid, the geometry law (child-radius == max(0, parent−padding)), scroll containment, css-hygiene, descriptor + negative controls (same-radius nesting FAILS)
ui-tabs/-tab/-tab-panel carry tablist/tab/tabpanel ARIA via internals (aria-selected/-controls/-labelledby), host carries no role attribute
roving tabindex (selected tab tabindex=0, rest -1) + ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End keyboard nav, re-armed on reconnect
bindable `selected` (reflected; the renderer two-way-binds it via LLD-C8, ADR-0019)
panel show/hide by selection (only the selected ui-tab-panel is shown)
click/keyboard commit sets `selected` + emits the family `select` event

tabs probes — roving tabindex 0/-1, panel toggle, ArrowRight moves selection, select event, zero residue + reconnect re-arm, css/descriptor/browser + a negative control (non-selected tab not tabindex=0)
ui-modal on a control-owned native <dialog>; `open`→showModal()/close() (top-layer + ::backdrop free); render() stays void
focus is TRAPPED inside the modal (the platform's showModal())
focus RESTORE on close to the recorded opener (the one platform gap the control owns)
Escape + backdrop dismissal close the dialog, sync open=false, and emit close/toggle
dialog ARIA on the part (aria-modal from showModal, accessible name via aria-labelledby/label); the host carries no role/aria attribute
bindable `open` (reflected; two-way via LLD-C8, value:{prop:'open',event:'toggle'}, ADR-0019)
<dialog> is not a form widget — honours 'no native form elements' (the ADR-0014 widgets-not-elements reading; submits nothing, no value)

modal probes — open toggles showModal/close, close event + open=false on platform close, focus restore to the exact opener, host has no role attr, css/descriptor/browser (top-layer above high-z sibling, trap, Escape, ::backdrop forced-colors) + a negative control

LLD-C8 — the generic two-way input binding controller (input.ts): a control's commit event writes its value into surface.data at valuePath (optimistic, structural-sharing), no per-component code (SPEC-R7)
input.ts probes — a stub control's input/change writes the bound path (only dependents wake, N2); teardown leaves zero listeners; a no-valueBinding widget installs no listener (negative control)
the default catalog declares Row/Column/Card/Tabs/Modal (+ region/item sub-types) bound to ui-* factories
the ChildList child model — regions/items compose as component-native sub-elements (SPEC-R3/R4)
direct binding, no adapter — container types bind directly to ui-* factories (SPEC-R8), no Basic-catalog translation
Tabs value:{prop:'selected',event:'select'} + Modal value:{prop:'open',event:'toggle'} declared for the LLD-C8 two-way bind (SPEC-R4)
the deferred ui-text-field value bind goes live through the same input.ts controller (zero text-field change, ADR-0019 cl.3)
a2ui-catalog SPEC §5.2 flips Row/Column/Card/Tabs/Modal experimental→shipped (Image/Video absent; List/Grid non-catalog primitives — SPEC-N2 no silent dead types)

the containers are consumable via the barrels — controls/index.ts exports + component-styles.css @imports (container.css first) + dom/index.ts (UIContainerElement/surfaceProps/flexProps); BASE_CLASSES gains UIContainerElement
tree-shake/size clean — importing one container drags only it + UIContainerElement + real deps; the import-layering trip-wire stays green
the component-reviewer scores ui-row/-column/-list/-grid both axes ≥4 (the G9 layout-primitive promotion gate)
the component-reviewer scores ui-card + regions both axes ≥4 (the G9 card promotion gate)
the component-reviewer scores ui-tabs + tab/panel both axes ≥4 (the G9 tabs promotion gate)
the component-reviewer scores ui-modal both axes ≥4 (the G9 modal promotion gate)
